title: Problem
description: Error envelope for Cloverleaf agent contracts. RFC 7807 Problem Details with Cloverleaf-specific extensions (prefixed 'cloverleaf.' per RFC 7807 §3.2).

type.description: URI reference identifying the problem type.

cloverleaf.work_item_id.description: Qualified reference to the Work Item this error relates to. Enables correlation with status-transition and gate-decision events.
